items.text:
Notice: Anderson Hall Study Lounge Reopening

The third-floor Study Lounge in Anderson Hall will reopen to all students on Monday, October 6, following two weeks of renovation. Regular hours will be 8:00 AM to 11:00 PM, Sunday through Thursday, and 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM on Friday and Saturday.

Students who wish to reserve a private group room must book online through the campus portal at least 24 hours in advance. Each reservation is limited to two hours per day. A $10 refundable deposit is required at booking and will be returned once the room is left clean and undamaged.

Please note the following rules:
- Food is not permitted; covered drinks are allowed.
- Study materials left overnight will be moved to the front desk.
- Quiet hours begin at 9:00 PM every evening.

For questions, please contact the Facilities Office at facilities@campus.edu or visit Room 112 before 5:00 PM on weekdays.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what must students do to reserve a private group room?

options.A: Pay a nonrefundable fee at the front desk
options.B: Book online at least 24 hours in advance
options.C: Arrive two hours before the lounge opens
options.D: Sign a paper form in the Facilities Office

questions.explanation: The notice states that students who wish to reserve a private group room 'must book online through the campus portal at least 24 hours in advance.'

questions.stem: What does the notice say about the $10 deposit?

options.A: It is added to the online portal fee
options.B: It must be paid in cash at Room 112
options.C: It is returned if the room is left clean
options.D: It covers food and drinks in the lounge

questions.explanation: The notice explains the '$10 refundable deposit ... will be returned once the room is left clean and undamaged.'

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this notice?

options.A: To announce the reopening and rules of the lounge
options.B: To advertise a new food service in Anderson Hall
options.C: To invite students to a renovation planning meeting
options.D: To explain how to apply for a facilities job

questions.explanation: The notice announces that the Study Lounge will reopen and then lists its hours, reservation procedure, and rules, so its overall purpose is to inform students of the reopening and its conditions.
